name: Greater Mark of Hospitality
description: You increase one ability score of your choice by 1. Your Ever Hospitable die increases from a d4 to a d6. Additionally, once per long rest, when you cast Purify Food and Drink, you can choose to instead reduce the exhaustion level of each creature of your choice within 30 feet by 1 and grant them temporary hit points equal to your proficiency bonus plus your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma modifier.
